# Auto-generated walkthrough guide

# score You have scored 0 out of 100, earning you the rank of Novice.
> score
# take map Family Zoo By Sharpee Tutorial Type HELP for instructions. Taken.
> take map
# take brochure Taken.
> take brochure
# read brochure Zoo brochure reads: WILLOWBROOK FAMILY ZOO — Your Guide
#   EXHIBITS: Petting Zoo — East from Main Path Aviary — West from Main Path
#   Gift...
> read brochure
# south Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> south
# take penny Taken. *DING DONG* "Attention visitors! The Willowbrook Family
#   Zoo will be closing in three hours.
> take penny
# east Petting Zoo A cheerful open-air enclosure filled with friendly animals.
> east
# take feed Taken.
> take feed
# feed goats You scatter some feed on the ground. The pygmy goats rush over,
#   bleating excitedly, and devour the corn and pellets in seconds.
> feed goats
# feed rabbits You sprinkle some pellets near the rabbits. Biscuit and
#   Marmalade hop over cautiously, then munch away happily.
> feed rabbits
# pet goats You reach down and pet the nearest goat. It leans into your hand
#   and bleats happily. The others crowd around, demanding equal attention.
> pet goats
# west Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> west
# west Aviary You step inside a soaring mesh dome. Brilliantly colored parrots
#   chatter from rope perches, and a toucan eyes you curiously from a branch
#   overhead.
> west
# west Gift Shop A small zoo gift shop crammed with stuffed animals and
#   postcards. A large souvenir penny press machine stands near the door.
> west
# take camera Taken.
> take camera
# photograph toys Click! You snap a photo of stuffed animals. That one's going
#   on the fridge. *DING DONG* "Attention visitors! One hour until closing.
> photograph toys
# Store the penny in the press
# put penny in press You put souvenir penny in souvenir press.
> put penny in press
# east Aviary You step inside a soaring mesh dome. Brilliantly colored parrots
#   chatter from rope perches, and a toucan eyes you curiously from a branch
#   overhead.
> east
# east Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> east
# north Zoo Entrance You stand before the wrought-iron gates of the
#   Willowbrook Family Zoo.
> north
# take keycard Taken. *DING DONG* "The Willowbrook Family Zoo is now closed.
#   Thank you for visiting! We hope to see you again soon!"
> take keycard
# south Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> south
# Unlock the gate
# unlock gate with keycard You unlock staff gate with staff keycard.
> unlock gate with keycard
# open gate You open staff gate.
> open gate
# south Supply Room A cluttered storage room behind the staff gate. Metal
#   shelves line the walls. A cork board on the wall is covered with staff
#   schedules.
> south
# take flashlight Taken.
> take flashlight
# switch on flashlight The flashlight switches on, banishing the darkness.
> switch on flashlight
# south Nocturnal Animals Exhibit A cool, dimly lit cavern designed to
#   simulate nighttime. Glass enclosures line both walls with soft red lights.
> south
# score You have scored 75 out of 100, earning you the rank of Expert.
> score
